selections.name: Red Square
selections.reason: Wesley Ward and Irad Ortiz Jr. turf sprint combo is elite. Strong debut speed figure of 113.

selections.name: Beijing
selections.reason: Prat rides for William Walden. Solid second-place finish last out with a 117 speed figure.

selections.name: He's My Kind
selections.reason: Consistent turf sprinter with tactical speed. Franco aboard for Clement.

selections.name: Blazing Tiger
selections.reason: Gaffalione takes the mount. Solid pedigree for the grass.

danger_horse.reason: Speedy type that could surprise if left alone on the lead.

selections.name: Regeneration
selections.reason: Chad Brown and Flavien Prat. Drops into maiden claiming and should find this field much easier.

selections.name: Discotheque
selections.reason: Consistent runner with multiple on-the-board finishes. Irad Ortiz Jr. takes the reins.

selections.name: Sir Duke
selections.reason: Gaffalione aboard for Carlos Martin. Solid inside draw to save ground.

selections.name: The Standard

danger_horse.name: Grand Gesture
danger_horse.reason: First start since reported as a gelding. Could show improved focus.

selections.name: Reddington

selections.name: Juneau
